title: Add required 'Open Questions' section to Investment Memo Bullet Generator
body: In 3 of the last 4 memo runs, the analyst manually appended an 'Open Questions' list after the harness passed, and IC feedback asked where the unresolved items were. Proposal: add 'Open Questions' to the skill's required section contract and harness, so unresolved diligence threads are structurally required rather than remembered.

evidence_json.observation: Repeated post-run manual edit: analysts appended 'Open Questions' after acceptance.

title: Org rail: risks in client-facing output carry severity tags
body: Board Update Condenser's severity-tagged risks were repeatedly praised in IC review, while memo-skill risks without tags drew clarifying questions. Proposal: org-wide rail requiring severity tags (high/medium/low) on risks in client-facing artifacts.

evidence_json.observation: Severity-tagged risk bullets received zero clarifying questions across 6 board updates; untagged memo risks averaged 1.5 follow-ups.

proposed_change.rail: MUST: tag risks with severity (high/medium/low) in client-facing output
